description: D3 — garble dictionary seeded from REAL field sessions (pwa-replay-harness Wave 5). Garbles are TEST INPUTS, never something the pipeline corrects (fuzzy correction is banned per research-methodology). Each entry records provenance. `sweep_safe: true` = the garble preserves the utterance's gate trigger (a digit or strong keyword survives), so the generated field sweep may apply it and still expect the dictation to flow; `sweep_safe: false` garbles kill the gate trigger and live only in dedicated session fixtures (e.g. the Custer utterance pinned in sess_mrbnds2d_jczh.yaml).

garbles.note: Killed the client-name regex + gate; inspector re-stated. Pinned in the session fixture.
Proper-noun mishear — value garble, trigger intact.
Pure junk utterance — chitchat-corpus material, must gate-block.
'My infuse is LIM' — backend recovered it; regex/gate keyword lost.
'Smoke alarm Zed s is limp.' — Zs trigger intact, value garbled; backend recovered LIM.
Corrected by equal-weight Flux keyterms in the probe; kept as a value-garble input.
Killed the trip-time keyword; drove the nova-3 boost 1.5→2.5.
Spelling-out garble the NumberNormaliser handles; canonical spoken form.
Number-word form — normaliser territory, trigger intact.
Chitchat-question garble — Sonnet asked for clarification.
